hypothesis: Stronger soft-dedup (14-day window, 0.15 penalty) reduces consecutive-day list overlap and raises weekly unique / NEW share on Skills digests, while still ranking by 7-day momentum so the list stays about discovery of real activity.
change_summary: Tighten soft-dedup for Skills digests only: DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_BRIEFINGS=14 and DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_PENALTY=0.15 (defaults today: 5 and 0.5).
notes: Experiment platform paused 2026-07-20 to focus on engagement growth. Not scheduled — re-register in data/experiments/ when resuming formal experiments. Backlog: RANK-2. METRIC PRIORITY (low traffic): (1) PRIMARY — structural diversity from digest.json: mean consecutive-day overlap, unique repos / 7 days, share of is_new in top 10. (2) SECONDARY — PostHog outbound_repo_click (edition=skills) and pageviews. Treatment flags: DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_BRIEFINGS=14 and DIGEST_SOFT_DEDUP_PENALTY=0.15 on Skills digest step in digest.yml.
